passages.passage_text: Study the following diagram to answer these questions.

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Find out the number that lies only inside the triangle.

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: What are the numbers that lie inside any two figures?

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Find out the number that lies inside all the figures.

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: See the following diagram carefully to answer the question that follows. Which of the following statements is correct according to the diagram given above?

choices.a: A and B lie in all the three figures
choices.b: E, A, B and C lie in all the three figures
choices.c: F, C, D, B and A lie in all the three figures
choices.d: Only B lies in all the three figures

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: See the given diagram and then find out the youth who does job but not educated.

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Identify the region that represents students who study Biology and computer but not Mathematics.

solutions.solution: Number 2 represents educated women who neither have Government job nor have private job because it lies in the space which is common to square and circle.
Ratio of drinkers = 15 out of 30 = 15/30 = 1/2 nd part of the whole. This condition is best depicted by the figure given in option (b).
